Description: Verify SwiftUI layout structure matches custom view 'ContentView'
Steps:
1. Instantiate ContentView container inside simulator.
2. Validate body hierarchy elements are drawn.
Expected: UI component ContentView should render its child elements without constraints failure.

Steps:
1. Instantiate MoodHeaderView container inside simulator.
2. Validate body hierarchy elements are drawn.
Expected: UI component MoodHeaderView should render its child elements without constraints failure.

Description: Verify SwiftUI layout structure matches custom view 'RecommendationCard'
Steps:
1. Instantiate RecommendationCard container inside simulator.
2. Validate body hierarchy elements are drawn.
Expected: UI component RecommendationCard should render its child elements without constraints failure.

Steps:
1. Locate reference view variable 'selectedMood'.
2. Trigger input event updates.
3. Assert view updates reactively.
Expected: Variable 'selectedMood' dynamically re-renders SwiftUI layout upon state mutation.

Description: Verify event action method 'analyzeMood()' executes successfully on tap
Steps:
1. Select button associated with method 'analyzeMood'.
2. Dispatch tap gesture trigger.
3. Assert correct state updates.
Expected: Triggers model mutations or API requests mapping to method 'analyzeMood' definition.

Description: Verify event action method 'toggleMood()' executes successfully on tap
Steps:
1. Select button associated with method 'toggleMood'.
2. Dispatch tap gesture trigger.
3. Assert correct state updates.
Expected: Triggers model mutations or API requests mapping to method 'toggleMood' definition.

Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .textFieldStyle(.roundedBorder)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with TextField style.
2. Assert modifier .textFieldStyle(.roundedBorder) exists.
Expected: Rounded border matches iOS design guidelines.

Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .padding(.horizontal)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with TextField bounds.
2. Assert modifier .padding(.horizontal) exists.
Expected: Has margin spacing to ensure screen boundary isolation.

Action/State: Layout assert: Analyze Mood button background
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .background(Color.accentColor)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Button accent.
2. Assert modifier .background(Color.accentColor) exists.
Expected: Theme accent color correctly applied as fill.

Action/State: Layout assert: Analyze Mood button text color
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .foregroundColor(.white)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Button label.
2. Assert modifier .foregroundColor(.white) exists.
Expected: Label matches accessibility standard contrast.

Action/State: Layout assert: Analyze Mood button cornerRadius
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .cornerRadius(12)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Button corners.
2. Assert modifier .cornerRadius(12) exists.
Expected: Buttons have smooth rounded borders of 12pt.

Action/State: Layout assert: Button Disabled State loading
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .disabled(isLoading || ...)
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Disabled State.
2. Assert modifier .disabled(isLoading || ...) exists.
Expected: Locks user interaction while API calls are executing.

Action/State: Layout assert: Transition animation for RecommendationCard
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: .transition(.opacity.combined(...))
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Animations.
2. Assert modifier .transition(.opacity.combined(...)) exists.
Expected: Renders recommendation with smooth fade and slide transition.

Action/State: Layout assert: Wand button for random selection
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: Image(systemName: "wand.and.stars")
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Toolbar Item.
2. Assert modifier Image(systemName: "wand.and.stars") exists.
Expected: Toolbar action renders system SF Symbol icon correctly.

Action/State: Layout assert: Heart button default state
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: Image(systemName: "heart")
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Heart State.
2. Assert modifier Image(systemName: "heart") exists.
Expected: Unliked songs display empty heart outline icon.

Action/State: Layout assert: Heart button selected state
Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: Image(systemName: "heart.fill")
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Heart State.
2. Assert modifier Image(systemName: "heart.fill") exists.
Expected: Liked songs display red filled heart icon with spring animation.

Description: Validate SwiftUI attribute: systemImage: "play.fill"
Steps:
1. Inspect UI builder node with Music Control.
2. Assert modifier systemImage: "play.fill" exists.
Expected: Play button renders standard playback symbol.
